children.heading: .—Information to Be Furnished to Congressional Committees
children.label: a .—Information to Be Furnished to Congressional Committees
children.text: The Director of the Missile Defense Agency shall provide to the congressional defense committees information on the results of each flight test of the ground-based midcourse national missile defense system.
A thorough discussion of the content and objectives of the test.
For each such test objective, a statement regarding whether or not the objective was achieved.

children.label: A
children.text: a thorough discussion describing the reasons that the objective was not achieved; and

children.label: B
children.text: a discussion of any plans for future tests to achieve that objective.
